title: RAW Intelligence Analyst
description: RAW (Research and Analysis Wing) Intelligence Analysts are responsible for gathering, analyzing, and interpreting intelligence information to protect India's national security interests. They assess threats, identify patterns, and provide actionable insights to policymakers and field operatives.
content: RAW Intelligence Analysts work with sensitive information, requiring utmost discretion and integrity. They use a variety of analytical techniques, including data mining, network analysis, and open-source intelligence (OSINT), to identify potential threats. The role demands strong analytical skills, critical thinking, and the ability to work under pressure. A deep understanding of geopolitics, security issues, and regional dynamics is crucial. Recruits often come from diverse academic backgrounds, including social sciences, languages, and technology.

financialFeasibility.note: While merit is the primary factor, access to quality education and coaching for competitive exams can be a significant advantage. Financial stability allows for focused preparation.

sectorScore.remarks: This role is almost exclusively within the government sector, specifically RAW. Private sector opportunities are extremely limited and indirect.

relatedCareers.reason: Shares a focus on law enforcement, security, and intelligence gathering.
relatedCareers.title: Ips Officer

relatedCareers.reason: Applies analytical and technical skills to protect digital assets and infrastructure.
relatedCareers.title: Cyber Security Analyst

relatedCareers.reason: Develops strong research, writing, and investigative skills.
relatedCareers.title: Journalist

genderDistribution.note: While traditionally male-dominated, RAW actively encourages female participation and values diverse perspectives.
